messages.content: 我们明白你可能由于时间冲突或者其他不可预见的原因，您无法参加Centric Brands Compliance System Training。我们一已经将培训的录制视频上传到LMS了，这是一个重要的培训，希望你们能够尽快观看它，如果有什么问题也请让我知道，
我会尽力解答。另外，如果您需要重新参加培训，请告诉我，我们可以安排适合您时间的培训。感谢您对我们公司合规计划的支持和配合。
我们明白你可能由于时间冲突或者其他不可预见的原因，您无法参加Centric Brands Compliance System Training。我们一已经将培训的录制视频上传到LMS了，这是一个重要的培训，希望你们能够尽快观看它，如果有什么问题也请让我知道。谢谢。帮我发封英语邮件给供应商们.

Dear valued supplier,

We understand that due to unforeseen circumstances or scheduling conflicts, you may not have been able to attend the Centric Brands Compliance System Training. We wanted to let you know that we have uploaded a recording of the training session onto the LMS system. This training is important and we kindly request that you watch it as soon as possible.

If you have any questions or concerns regarding the training, please do not hesitate to let us know. Additionally, if you need to attend a live training session, we would be happy to arrange a time that is convenient for you.

Thank you for your support and cooperation with our company's compliance program.

Best regards,
[Your name]

我发了这封邮件
Dear Valued Supplier,
 
We would like to invite you to attend Centric Brands Compliance System Training, which has been rescheduled to accommodate participants from different time zones. The training sessions soon, which will be held on Teams and conducted in English. The training session link will be provided at a later time.
 
Please choose the timeslot that works best for you from the following:
 
1.	6/14 4:00pm-5:00pm (Beijing Time)
2.	6/20 4:00pm-5:00pm (Beijing Time)
 
We will conduct the training session with most of the vendor choose. Please kindly respond to this email with your preferred time slot by June 14th. Thank you.
 
供应商回复我这句话是什么意思Good Morning BD time. Please advise, which dept. you want for this training?
This message from the supplier is asking which department the training is intended for. They are asking for clarification on which department should attend the training session.
我们理解由于不可预见的情况或日程冲突，您可能未能参加在6月9日Centric Brands合规系统培训 英语翻译
We understand that due to unforeseen circumstances or scheduling conflicts, you may not have been able to attend the Centric Brands Compliance System Training on June 9th.
Please advise, which dept. you want for this training? 可以翻译成哪个时间更适合您吗

No, "Please advise, which dept. you want for this training?" cannot be translated as "Which time slot works best for you?" Instead, "Please advise, which dept. you want for this training?" is asking which department the training is intended for.
是的。请在附件中找到我的修订。怎么翻译成英文
"Yes, please find my revisions in the attachment."
Please find attached my revised是什么意思
"Please find attached my revised" means "I have attached a document that has been revised and I am informing you of this in the email."
翻译成中文
"Please find attached my revised" 的意思是“我已经在邮件中附上了经过修订的文件，并通知您这一点”。

Hi Tim,

Yes. Please find attached my changed, thank you!
是什么意思？
这封邮件的意思是：“嗨，蒂姆，是的，附上了我的更改，请查收，谢谢！”邮件中可能包含有关某个文件或修订版本的信息。

We would like to invite you to attend Centric Brands Compliance System Training, which has been rescheduled to accommodate participants from different time zones. The training sessions soon, which will be held on Teams and conducted in English. The training session link will be provided at a later time.

Please choose the timeslot that works best for you from the following:

1. 6/14 4:00pm-5:00pm (Beijing Time)
2. 6/20 4:00pm-5:00pm (Beijing Time)

We will conduct the training session with most of the vendor choose. Please kindly respond to this email with your preferred time slot by June 14th. Thank you.

Please advise, which dept. you want for this training?  这个培训主要是什么？
这个培训主要是为Centric Brands的合规系统而进行的，旨在帮助供应商更好地了解公司的合规要求，以确保他们的业务符合公司的合规标准。邮件中询问供应商在哪个部门需要这个培训，可能是为了统计参加培训的供应商的数量，以便公司可以更好地准备和安排培训。
你觉得哪个部门参加会更好，英文怎么说

Without knowing the specific details of the Centric Brands Compliance System Training and the departments of the supplier company, it is difficult to determine which department would benefit the most from attending the training. However, you can ask the supplier if there is a particular department that they believe would benefit most from attending the training. In English, you could say: "Do you have a department in mind that you believe would benefit the most from attending this training?"
Thanks for the confirmation. Here is the training link for your reference. 是什么意思
"Thanks for the confirmation. Here is the training link for your reference."的意思是“感谢您确认收到邮件。这是培训的链接，供您参考和使用。”邮件中可能包含有关公司的合规培训，以及一些课程细节和链接。该句话则是向对方提供了相关的链接。

Dear Valued Supplier,

We understand that due to unforeseen reasons or scheduling conflicts, you may not have been able to attend the Centric Brands Compliance System Training on June 9. 

We would like to let you know that we have uploaded the recording of the training session onto the LMS, Resource Center ,Compliance System Training. The LMS platform’s website and your ID/password are the same as I sent you before.  This training is very important and please kindly watch it as soon as possible.

If you have any questions regarding the training, please let us know. Thank you.

根据这封邮件，再写一封邮件，根据以下意思。很抱歉写第二封邮件，只是为了确认你们有观看录制培训视频，请在6月20日之前完成观看，谢谢。 发封英语邮件告诉供应商们

Dear Valued Supplier,

We apologize for sending a second email, but we just wanted to confirm that you have accessed and watched the recording of the Centric Brands Compliance System Training. As mentioned in our previous email, we uploaded the recording onto the LMS platform's Resource Center, Compliance System Training section, and provided you with your ID and password.

Since this training is an important part of our company's compliance program, we kindly ask that you watch the recording as soon as possible and complete it before June 20th. 

If you encounter any difficulties accessing the recording or have any questions regarding the training, please let us know and we will do our best to provide you with assistance.

Thank you for your attention to this matter and for your continued partnership with Centric Brands.

Best regards,
[Your name]
重新写一封

Dear Valued Supplier,

We hope this email finds you well. We recently uploaded the recording of the Centric Brands Compliance System Training onto the LMS platform's Resource Center, Compliance System Training section. We understand that you may have not been able to attend the live training session due to unforeseen reasons or scheduling conflicts.

This training is a vital part of our company's compliance program, and we kindly ask that you watch the recording as soon as possible to ensure that you are up to date with our compliance requirements.

We apologize for any inconvenience and kindly request that you complete watching the training before June 20th. 

If you encounter any issues accessing the recording or have any questions regarding the training, please let us know, and we will provide you with support.

Thank you for your continued partnership and support of our company's compliance program.

Best regards,
[Your name]
Just would like to confirm that you have access and watch the recording of the Centric Brands Compliance System Training. Please completed the recording training view in LMS, My Learning, Thank you.

I would rephrase it as follows:

We would like to kindly confirm whether you have been able to access and watch the recording of the Centric Brands Compliance System Training. We uploaded the recording onto the LMS platform's My Learning section, and we hope that you have been able to view it.

If you have not yet had the opportunity to watch the recording, we kindly ask that you complete the training view in LMS as soon as possible. This training is an important part of our company's compliance program, and it is essential that all our suppliers are updated on our compliance requirements.

Thank you for your continued partnership and support in upholding our compliance standards.

Best regards,
[Your name]

Sorry for the second email.

We just would like to kindly confirm whether you have access and watch the recording of the Centric Brands Compliance System Training. We uploaded the recording video onto the LMS platform’s My Learning section, and we hope that you have been able to view it. Please kindly complete the training view in LMS as soon as possible by June 20th. Thank you.
有语法错误吗？什么意思

There are minor grammar errors in the email, such as using "access" instead of "accessed" and using "view it" when "watch it" would be more appropriate. Here is a corrected version:

"Sorry for the second email.

We would just like to confirm whether you have accessed and watched the recording of the Centric Brands Compliance System Training. We uploaded the recording video onto the LMS platform's My Learning section and hope that you have been able to watch it. Please complete the training view in LMS as soon as possible by June 20th. Thank you for your continued attention to this matter."

The email is asking whether the supplier has had a chance to watch the recording of the Centric Brands Compliance System Training, which was uploaded onto the My Learning section of the LMS platform. The supplier is kindly being reminded to complete watching the training video in LMS before June 20th.

Sorry for the second email.

We just would like to kindly confirm whether you have access and watch the recording of the Centric Brands Compliance System Training. We uploaded the recording video onto the LMS platform’s My Learning section, and we hope that you have been able to view it. Please kindly complete the training view in LMS as soon as possible by June 20th. Thank you.
由语法错误吗

Yes, there are grammar errors in this email. It should read: 

"Sorry for the second email. We would just like to kindly confirm whether you have accessed and watched the recording of the Centric Brands Compliance System Training. We uploaded the recording video onto the LMS platform's My Learning section, and we hope that you have been able to view it. Please kindly complete the training view in LMS as soon as possible, by June 20th. Thank you." 

The corrections include adding commas after "possible" and "section", and changing "watch" to "watched" since the training recording has already been uploaded.
